overall.description: A first-person walk through a dystopian cyberpunk city at dusk, transitioning from a covered industrial walkway under an overpass to an open intersection with a panoramic view of a neon-lit skyline. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring futuristic architecture, holographic billboards, and moderate vehicle traffic against an orange sunset sky.

events.description: large yellow articulated bus passes by on the left side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow concrete sidewalk beneath a massive concrete overpass, moving parallel to traffic

notable_agents.action: yellow articulated transit bus driving past from behind to front along the adjacent road

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge overhead with metal support beams and pipes
tall metal lattice electricity pylon with multiple high-tension cables
long yellow articulated bus with red stripes and dark windows
smooth gray concrete wall with metal railings and barbed wire

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete overpass in a narrow industrial walkway. A yellow transit bus passes by on the left as the camera moves forward. The environment is dimly lit with a large power tower visible ahead against the evening sky.

events.description: exits the covered area under the overpass into open air with more sky visible
approaching the street intersection, preparing to cross the road

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the environment opens up, approaching a crosswalk with increasing visibility of the city ahead

entered.detail: tall curved metal street light with dual lamps
futuristic skyscrapers with glowing windows and spires visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens to reveal more of the evening sky and the distant cyberpunk skyline. The camera continues forward along the sidewalk, passing the industrial power tower which now dominates the center of the frame, while approaching a street intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with heavy industrial elements

events.description: turning left to face the city center, revealing the full skyline view
multiple vehicles including a dark sedan pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street while turning to face the downtown skyline, observing the moderate traffic flow

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: large vertical digital display showing colorful shifting advertisements
dark paved road with yellow lane markings and crosswalk lines

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the asphalt intersection while turning left, shifting the perspective from the industrial power tower to the expansive city skyline. Vehicles pass through the intersection as large neon holographic billboards become visible on the left, illuminated against the dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza overlooking cyberpunk city center with holographic displays

events.description: large holographic billboard on the left becomes fully visible with bright neon colors

agents.ego_description: standing at the edge of the intersection, panning to observe the traffic and the illuminated futuristic cityscape

notable_agents.action: white van driving along the road from left to right

entered.detail: dense collection of high-rise buildings with spires, antennae, and illuminated windows
dark industrial smoke rising from a chimney against the orange sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The final segment presents a wide panoramic view of the cyberpunk city center at dusk. The camera pans slowly across the scene, showing dense futuristic skyscrapers, a large vibrant holographic billboard on the left, and moderate traffic flowing through the intersection. Industrial smoke rises in the distance against the warm sunset colors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed industrial corridor into a wide, neon-lit urban panorama at dusk. It begins under a massive concrete overpass in a narrow walkway, moving forward as a yellow transit bus passes by on the left. As the camera exits the covered area, the environment opens up to reveal a towering industrial power tower and a glimpse of the distant skyline against the evening sky. The scene then shifts as the camera crosses an asphalt intersection and turns left, moving away from the power tower toward vibrant holographic billboards and flowing vehicle traffic. Finally, the perspective expands into a panoramic view of the city center, panning across dense futuristic skyscrapers and rising industrial smoke under the warm colors of a sunset.
